ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bug_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bug type (e.g., DOM, XBL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the bug type (e.g., security, functionality) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the severity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the milestone */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug type */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity level */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone affected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "workarounds" TEXT /* Workarounds for the bug */,
  "date_fixed" TEXT /* Date when the bug was fixed */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to fix the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., open, in-progress, fixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES bug_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severities ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, security analyst, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_workarounds" (
  "workaround_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workaround */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the workaround is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workaround */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workaround */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the workaround was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workaround_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_workarounds_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the report is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, in-progress, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_fixes" (
  "fix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fix */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the fix is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fix */,
  "fix_date" TEXT /* Date when the fix was implemented */,
  "fixed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who implemented the fix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_fixes_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed (e.g., description, severity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_audits_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bug */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_access_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug that was revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_revisions_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the project manager */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project they manage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the comment is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
